nasb.text: Who will stand up for me against evildoers? Who will take his stand for me against those who do wickedness?

esv.text: Who rises up for me against the wicked? Who stands up for me against evildoers?

cnv.text: 誰肯為我起來攻擊作惡的人呢？ 誰肯為我挺身而起對抗作孽的人呢？

ccb.text: 谁肯为我奋起攻击恶人？ 谁肯为我起来抵挡作恶的人？

csbs.text: 谁为我起来反对作恶者呢？ 谁为我站出来反对做坏事的人呢？
